name: kubde-jewellers
description: Kubde Jewellers website and admin panel

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run admin"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.renameSync('client/dist', 'dist');"
